title_en: 37. Ash-Shaikh al-Albaanee says in 'ad-Da'eefah', no.995: There is not to be found
title_ar: الحديث السابع والثلاثون: قول الشيخ الألباني في الضعيفة رقم ٩٩٥
content_en: in the Sunnah anything which obligates taking fresh water for the ears - therefore he should wipe them along with the water for the head - just as it is also permissible to wipe the head with the water remaining from that of the arms after washing them according to the hadith of Ar-Rabee' bint Mu'awwidh that the Prophet (sallallaahu 'alaihi wa sallam) "wiped his head with water remaining in his hand". [Reported by Abu Dawood and others with hasan isnaad]. THE WAY OF WIPING
title_id: Hadis 37: Tidak Ada Kewajiban Mengambil Air Baru untuk Telinga
content_id: Syaikh Al-Albani berkata dalam Ad-Daifah, no. 995: Tidak ditemukan dalam Sunnah sesuatu yang mewajibkan pengambilan air baru untuk telinga. Oleh karena itu, seseorang seharusnya mengusap telinga bersama air kepala. Demikian pula diperbolehkan mengusap kepala dengan air yang tersisa dari membasuh lengan berdasarkan hadis Ar-Rabia binti Muawwidz bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengusap kepalanya dengan air yang tersisa di tangannya. [Diriwayatkan oleh Abu Dawud dan lainnya dengan sanad hasan]. CARA MENGUSAP.
content_ar: in the السنة anything which obligates taking fresh water for the ears - لذلك he should wipe them along with the water for the head - just as it is أيضاً permissible to wipe the head with the water remaining from that of the arms بعد washing them وفقاً لـ the الحديث of Ar-Rabee' bint Mu'awwidh that النبي ﷺ (ﷺ) "wiped his head with water remaining in his hand". [Reported by أبو داود and others with حسن isnaad]. THE الطريق OF WIPING
